description_long: This bungalow features a low-pitched, multi-hipped roof with gray shingles and a prominent central gable above the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of muted blue-gray and off-white, with large rectangular windows distributed across all sides, allowing ample natural light. The front facade includes a covered entryway with a modern, partially glazed garage door and a sheltered porch area. The structure sits on a neatly manicured green lawn, and the overall footprint is wide and single-storied, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods. The side and rear elevations reveal additional windows and a simple, clean-lined design with minimal ornamentation. The roof overhangs provide shade and architectural interest, while the building's proportions emphasize horizontal lines and open, accessible living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a multi-hipped gray shingle roof, large windows, and a covered entryway, set on a green lawn. The exterior features blue-gray and off-white walls with a wide, horizontal layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, garage door, and large front window.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof, grouped side windows, and some wall-mounted panels or decorative elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple large windows and the full width of the bungalow's back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional windows and a clear view of the roof's complex hip structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
